name: 大團圓懷孕收尾
description: 反派被清除後，女主懷孕的消息為全劇畫上圓滿句號，連天庭的閻王都要趕緊給男主加壽命，喜劇與溫馨並存。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Could it be you're pregnant? Really? A baby... Oh no. That shevil is having a baby. What do we do? I need to extend her husband's lifespan. If he dies, then no one will be able to control that she devil.
